active_goal: Industry-standards-following Swift macOS app (possibly OSS) that does what the ../agendum CLI does — viewer for my GitHub stuff — with native architecture: app-owned GRDB SQLite, no Python at runtime, Apple-canonical SwiftUI/Observation/structured-concurrency. Speed-run port per the 2026-05-09 plan revision and 2026-05-10 scope refinement.

features.title: Realign Mac dashboard around terminal-style sectioned task list
features.evidence: Issue #42 closed as completed; PR #43 merged into feature/mac-prototype on 2026-05-08 as squash commit d516b86. Local implementation on codex/visual-layout-direction passed: swift build; swift build --target AgendumMac; swift test --filter AgendumFeatureTests.TaskWorkflowModelTests (111 XCTest tests before review fix); swift test --enable-code-coverage (126 XCTest tests plus 7 Swift Testing tests before review fix); Python unittest discover (68 tests); Python coverage 499/540 lines (92.4%); Scripts/build_app_bundle.sh; bundle existence/executable checks; plutil -lint; swift run AgendumMac launch smoke; jq; git diff --check. PR review fix for stale hidden-task selection/action targeting passed: swift build --target AgendumMac; focused visible-section lookup test; swift test --enable-code-coverage (127 XCTest tests plus 7 Swift Testing tests); git diff --check. Adversarial F1 repo fallback fix passed: swift test --filter TaskWorkflowModelTests (114 XCTest tests); swift build --target AgendumMac; git diff --check. GitHub Actions Test passed on PR #43 merge head.
features.notes: Default source is All; Issues and Manual are separate sections; task actions are in a focused sheet opened from the selected row; status/section colors mirror ../agendum/src/agendum/widgets.py.

features.title: TaskStore actor + TaskStoreProviding protocol seam
features.evidence: Issue #48 closed; PR #49 merged into feature/mac-prototype on 2026-05-09 as squash commit b33e8d6 after four adversarial review passes. Final validation: swift build; swift test --enable-code-coverage (129 XCTest + 36 Swift Testing tests, 18 of which are TaskStoreTests); Python unittest 68 tests; swift run smoke; git diff --check; GitHub Actions Test passed (1m33s). Review fixes across four passes: Task leak in observe fixed via onTermination cancellation; markSeen sets seen + last_seen_at + updated_at to match Python update_task; sort order changed to seen ASC, updated_at DESC, id DESC to match Python get_active_tasks; limit clamped to 1..200; terminal statuses (merged/closed/done) excluded by default; timestamps emitted in Python-compatible yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSSSS+00:00 format so Swift- and Python-written rows sort lexicographically together.
features.notes: Foundation for the speed-run port. S1 will route BackendStatusModel directly through TaskStore for reads/mutations/manual create.

features.title: Wire dashboard reads through TaskStoreProviding (old plan)
features.evidence: Superseded by 2026-05-09 speed-run plan revision. C3 was the bridge slice that assumed Python sync would keep writing to SQLite while Swift took over reads — that requires a Python-process observation strategy (IPC vs file-system watcher vs polling) which is non-trivial plumbing. The speed-run plan tears Python out wholesale, so the bridge is never built. Equivalent app-side wiring is folded into S1.

features.title: Add native GRDB-backed data store
features.evidence: C1 (PR #45, c9cebde) and C2 (PR #49, b33e8d6) merged into feature/mac-prototype. C3/C4 (dashboard reads + mutations) folded into speed-run S1. C5 (Application Support relocation) deferred to post-MVP per the 2026-05-09 plan revision.
features.notes: Tracked by epic #26 (body to be updated to reflect speed-run sequence).

features.title: Speed-run port: tear Python out, ship MVP viewer (industry-standards Mac app)
features.evidence: Captured in 2026-05-09 plan revision and 2026-05-10 scope refinement. Sequence: S0 (write docs/syncer-spec.md), S1 (BackendStatusModel direct → TaskStore), S2 (URLSession transport + concurrent-fetch helper), S3+S4 merged (faithful syncer port minus /notifications overlay + module reshape + helper bridge deletion = MVP gate), S5 (onboarding & first-run polish). Source of truth: ../agendum/src/agendum/ (original CLI), NOT Backend/agendum_engine/ (vendored fork that doubled with mac-specific complexity). North star: industry-standards-following Mac app, possibly OSS — opportunistic refactoring is in-scope through MVP.
features.notes: Deferred to post-MVP: B4 (native OAuth, keep gh CLI dep through MVP), C5 (DB relocation), A6 (polish), filesystem deletion of Backend/agendum_engine/, OSS-readiness (LICENSE, README, contributor guide). Multi-workspace UI stays for MVP per 2026-05-10 (user actively switches workspaces).

features.title: S0: Write docs/syncer-spec.md from ../agendum/ source
features.evidence: PR #53 squash-merged into feature/mac-prototype as 8d6b329 on 2026-05-09. 416 LOC + 22 LOC review fixes. Adversarial review surfaced 4 critical findings (C1 race-update field set, C2 idempotency wording, C3 to_update mutation note, M6 asymmetric URL rewriting in notification overlay) plus 5 major findings (M1-M5: author filter callout, qualifying_reviews state semantics, defensive timeline access, close-eligibility ordering, status/title unconditional comparison). All fixed in-spec; new parity-test fixture cases added in §9.
features.notes: Behavior contract for the syncer port. Source of truth is ../agendum/src/agendum/, NOT Backend/agendum_engine/.

features.title: S1: BackendStatusModel direct → TaskStore (subsumes old C3+C4+B3-app)
features.evidence: Issue #54 closed; PR #55 squash-merged into feature/mac-prototype as ffad547 on 2026-05-10 after a two-pass adversarial review. Final validation: swift build clean; swift test --enable-code-coverage (130 XCTest + 53 Swift Testing); Python unittest 68 tests; swift run smoke; git diff --check; GitHub Actions Test passed (2m4s). Changes: TaskStore.init(path:) → DatabasePool with WAL config; new TaskStore methods updateTaskStatus/removeTask/createManualTask/searchTasks; TaskStoreProviding gains the four new methods; BackendStatusModel gets a TaskStoreFactory and lazy requireStore(); helper still owns auth/sync/workspace/diagnostics. Round-1 fixes: parent dir creation + chmod 0o600 (matches Python init_db); searchTasks haystack at TaskRecord level (gh_repo/tags/gh_url/gh_author_name now searchable); friendly storeNotReady error mapping. Round-2 fixes: searchTasks candidate set unbounded (was capped at 200, would silently miss matches in large workspaces); perTaskAvailable now gated on isLoading (closes the workspace-switch race); tags JSON-fallback matches Python _normalize_tags for non-array values.
features.notes: Helper still owns auth/sync/workspace/diagnostics until S3. Deferred residuals: C1 (MainActor blocking on first lazy store init — needs cold-start benchmark), M1/M3/M4/M6.

features.title: S2: Native GitHub transport (URLSession + concurrent-fetch)
features.evidence: PR #57 squash-merged into feature/mac-prototype as 77feb8d on 2026-05-11 after two adversarial review cycles. New AgendumGitHub module: GitHubClient actor + GhCLITokenProvider + AsyncSemaphore + Codable response types + the two GraphQL queries copied verbatim from ../agendum/src/agendum/gh.py. Cycle-1 fixes (3 critical, 6 major): AsyncSemaphore cancellation leak (withTaskCancellationHandler + UUID-keyed waiters); GHNodes/GHCommits null→empty decode; AnyEncodable+RawJSON replaced with typed GraphQLVariable enum (Bool-dispatch + nested-value bugs eliminated); discoverReviewPRs `ok` semantics aligned with Python (empty results keep ok=true; only caught transport errors flip false); partial-success errors surfaced via (data, partialErrors) tuple; gh subprocess 10s deadline via runProcessWithDeadline + TimeoutWatchdog; 429 / 403+Retry-After surface as .rateLimited; 401 retry replays POST body. Cycle-2: zero critical/major findings → early exit. Final validation: swift build; swift test (130 XCTest + 81 Swift Testing, 28 in AgendumGitHubTests); Python unittest 68 tests; swift run smoke; git diff --check; GitHub Actions Test passed (3m2s).
features.notes: Cycle-2 minors deferred to S3+S4 or later: R2-1 TimeoutWatchdog narrow race, R2-2 URLSession cache policy on GETs, R2-3 401 retry runs applyAuth twice on success-after-401, R2-4 POST redirect handling, R2-5/R2-6 coverage gaps for .bool encoding + .missingData branch, R2-7 429 without Retry-After/x-ratelimit-remaining, R2-8 X-GitHub-Api-Version header pin. See docs/project-state.md §'S2 Deferred Minors'.

features.title: S3+S4: Swift sync engine + cutover + module reshape (MVP gate)
features.evidence: Branch codex/s3-s4-sync-and-cutover; implemented checkpoints: ef4da01 (module setup + diff_tasks port + B2 module move), 8542c3b (ResponseMapping +16 tests), 73aa675 (ApplyDiff +16 tests), 5764f83 (RepoFetcher +11 tests), 2026-05-12 ReviewFetcher checkpoint (Sources/AgendumSync/ReviewFetcher.swift + 9 ReviewFetcherTests; validation passed: swift build, swift test --filter AgendumSyncTests.ReviewFetcherTests, swift test --enable-code-coverage, git diff --check). Remaining: WorkspaceConfig, SyncEngine, cutover (BackendStatusModel.forceSync → SyncEngine; native gh auth status; delete helper subprocess), module reshape (kill AgendumBackend, rename BackendStatusModel→DashboardModel, drop AgendumTask).
features.notes: Next commit: WorkspaceConfig.swift — load workspace config.toml into the sync-engine config shape.

features.title: S5: Onboarding & first-run polish
features.notes: Materialize default ~/.agendum/config.toml if missing (matches Python helper template). Settings UI: orgs/repos as form fields (text-list editor) instead of 'edit this TOML file'. If gh auth status returns unauthenticated, surface a banner with 'Run gh auth login in Terminal' + copy-to-clipboard button. First-run sheet: brief 'add your org or repos in Settings, then click Sync' guidance. ~200 LOC.

features.title: Add AgendumMacStore target on GRDB with TaskRecord schema
features.evidence: Issue #44 completed by PR #45, merged into feature/mac-prototype as squash commit c9cebde. Local branch codex/c1-grdb-store-schema added Package.swift GRDB dependency resolved to 7.10.0, Package.resolved, Sources/AgendumMacStore/Schema.swift, and Tests/AgendumMacStoreTests/TaskRecordTests.swift. Validation passed: swift build; swift test --filter AgendumMacStoreTests; swift test --enable-code-coverage; swift run AgendumMac launch smoke; jq; git diff --check; GitHub Actions Test passed on PR #45. Adversarial review fixes added legacy gh_node_id column migration coverage, stronger schema/index tests, non-optional timestamp construction, a persistence guard against writing nil required timestamps, nullable seen reads, and repeatable active-status cleanup.
features.notes: No runtime dashboard wiring. C2 must use DatabaseSchema.prepare(_:) and cover nullable seen / nullable legacy timestamps in record-to-domain mapping tests.

B4 (native OAuth) deferred to post-MVP.
